name: IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRplcLoad

text.value: WITH SourceData AS ( SELECT st.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK, st.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, st.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, st.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, st.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, st.ICD_VRSN_CD_SK, st.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_DESC, st.ICD_DIAG_CLM_MPPNG_DESC, '@{pipeline().parameters.VersionId}' AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.X1_TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRplcLoad st ) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC T USING SourceData S ON (T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.ICD_VRSN_CD_SK = S.ICD_VRSN_CD_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_DESC = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_DESC, T.ICD_DIAG_CLM_MPPNG_DESC = S.ICD_DIAG_CLM_MPPNG_DESC, T.VRSN_ID = S.VRSN_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, ICD_VRSN_CD_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_DESC, ICD_DIAG_CLM_MPPNG_DESC, VRSN_ID) VALUES (S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.ICD_VRSN_CD_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_DESC, S.ICD_DIAG_CLM_MPPNG_DESC, S.VRSN_ID);

Description:
CALLED BY: CblTalnCchgLoadSeq

PROCESSING:  Loads data into CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP table and rejected records into a Rej file.
